name: assets-mcp
description: Search and fetch offline design assets: icons, illustrations, and fonts, with license and attribution metadata.
long_description:
An offline MCP server bundling icons, illustrations, and fonts for use in design and development work — no network access or API keys required.

**Key features:**

- **Icons** — 8 vendored Iconify sets (Bootstrap Icons, Feather, Heroicons, Lucide, Material Symbols, Phosphor, Simple Icons, Tabler), rendered to standalone SVG with optional color and size overrides
- **Illustrations** — 3 vendored CC0-1.0 SVG collections (Open Doodles, Humaaans, Open Peeps)
- **Fonts** — 14 OFL-1.1 font families as woff2 files, with optional @font-face CSS generation
- **License metadata** — every asset source carries its license and attribution, surfaced via `list_asset_sources`
- **Fully offline** — all asset data is vendored at build time; no network calls are made at runtime

output_dir.title: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory to write rendered assets to (default: OS temp dir + /assets-mcp)

tools.name: list_asset_sources
tools.description: List every asset source with its license, attribution, and count

tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Search vendored icon sets by name

tools.name: get_icon
tools.description: Render an icon to SVG and write it to disk

tools.name: search_illustrations
tools.description: Search vendored illustration collections by name

tools.name: get_illustration
tools.description: Fetch an SVG illustration and write it to disk

tools.name: search_fonts
tools.description: Search vendored font families by name, slug, or category

tools.name: get_font
tools.description: Fetch a font's woff2 file (and optional @font-face CSS) and write it to disk
